name: artemis
description: A full-stack application inspired by NASA's Artemis II mission, the next step in humanity's return to the Moon. This project serves as an educational implementation based on the "Nasa Project" from the [Complete NodeJS Developer Course (GraphQL, MongoDB, + more)](https://www.udemy.com/course/complete-nodejs-developer-zero-to-mastery/).

scripts.install: npm run install-server && npm run install-client
scripts.watch: concurrently "npm run server" "set REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:5082&& npm run client"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run dev --prefix server

author: Manuel Morales
